user.title: Roaming Music
user.description: Add a room to Roaming Music

room.title: Add Room
room.description: Enter a name for the new room.

error.name_already_in_use: A room with this name already exists.

init.title: Room Configuration
init.description: Choose which room settings to edit.{save_notice}

speakers_volume.title: Speakers & Volume
speakers_volume.description: Configure the speakers and volume settings for this room.

presence_sensors.title: Presence Sensors
presence_sensors.description: Select presence sensors and configure their occupied state values.{no_states_warning}

global.title: Roaming Music Settings
global.description: Configure global behaviour for Roaming Music

data.pause_target_mode:
Target Mode

Target Mode Auto: Roaming Music tries to determine which speakers to pause.
Target Mode Manual: Roaming Music will pause the selected speaker entitie(s)

error.entity_not_found: One or more selected entities were not found in Home Assistant.
error.no_states_for_sensor: This sensor has no selectable states. It will not trigger occupancy until its state is known.
error.default_volume_out_of_range: Default volume must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
error.fade_duration_out_of_range: Fade duration must be between 1.0 and 30.0 seconds.
error.grace_period_out_of_range: Grace period must be between 0 and 1800 seconds.
error.pause_target_entities_required: At least one pause target entity is required when mode is Manual and action is Pause or Stop.

fade_volume.name: Fade Volume
fade_volume.description: Smoothly fade the volume of one or more media players.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Media player entity (or entities) to fade.

curve.name: Curve
curve.description: Fade curve type: logarithmic, bezier, or linear.
